_readme: PHASE 3 ladder league: obs v1.1 (77 floats: killProb/rung-pay/next-rung/breakpoints), dense VP reward (rStep = dVP/30 + dPhi_ascend), --win-bonus 1.0 on true 30-VP finishes, gamma .999, farm-value + reward-pick aux heads ON. Goal: a champion that WINS (>=25 meanVP, >=50% 30-VP finishes), not one that out-places a 7-VP field. Fair-recipe otherwise (random init, PPO, 8 heuristic anchors).
